name: Easy Steak and Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 to 1 pound leftover rare steak, sliced thin
2 to 3 cups washed, torn, fresh spinach
2 cups lettuce (Boston, Romaine, Butter Crunch, torn)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice beef into bite-size pieces.
2. Wash and dry greens.
3. Place greens in a bowl with mushrooms.
4. In a bottle, combine oil, wine vinegar, salt, pepper, garlic, and minced green onions. Shake to combine. Let sit.
5. Add beef to greens.
6. Pour dressing over the salad.
7. Toss and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
